behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all files (constants.ts, fixture-utils.ts, runner.ts, runner-watch.ts), flags (--debug/-d, --pattern/-p, --update/-u), keyboard keys (p, d, a), CLAUDE.md path, and mentions FILTER_FILENAME/testfilter.txt/readTestFilter/subscribeFilterFile indirectly through descriptions.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what to change (remove file-based filter, add CLI flags, interactive watch mode) without giving exact code or line-level fixes.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests use flexible regexes (e.g., /key\.name/, /initialPattern|filter|pattern.*string/i) and check for absence of specific old APIs, allowing multiple valid implementations.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute yarn install, tsc, build, jest, lint, and actually run the built CLI with --help; not purely grep-based.

test_not_tautological.reason: f2p tests require actual removal of file-based mechanism and real CLI flag implementation (verified via --help of built binary), not satisfiable by stubs.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover CLI flags, watch mode keyboard handling, filter mechanism removal, CLAUDE.md creation, and build/lint gates — matching instruction requirements.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section headers (Gates, Fail-to-pass code behavior, CLAUDE.md tests) and descriptive docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: No structured data output; task is code refactor plus markdown doc.

no_typos.reason: File paths and commands look correct (compiler/packages/snap/src/..., yarn snap, etc.).

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction identifies relevant files (part of the task scope) but does not pinpoint exact lines or exact code changes.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Not an agentmd-edits config task; code changes plus new CLAUDE.md doc.
